Our Research

Description about our research

Research Thrusts

Computing's Carbon Footprint

including embodied carbon due to physical manufacturing, and operational carbon from day-to-day use.

Description

View Full Research Thrust Details →
Emerging Nanomaterials for Ultra-Dense Integration of Computation and Memory

leveraging monolithic 3D integration, chiplet-based systems, and 3D die stacking.

Description

View Full Research Thrust Details →
Electronic-Photonic Integrated Circuits

for energy-efficient communication in datacenter-scale distributed computing systems.

Description

View Full Research Thrust Details →

Projects within this Thrust

  • Digital-to-Optical Converters (DOCs) — Active
